Off Calendar May-08-2019 Off Calendar

Defendant Wuxi Suntech Power Co., Ltd'S Motion To Set Aside Default/Default Judgment/Leave To Defend.(Part 2 Of 2 For Tentative Ruling Only)
Off Calendar Mar-21-2019 Off Calendar

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-21-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Leila Nafrid, esq. (415-78-6850) of Payne & Fears LLP for Plaintiff.
Christopher Kao, esq. (415-983-1159) and Rebecca Friedeman, esq. (415-983-1012) of Pillsbury...LLP for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WUXI SUNTECH POWER CO., LTD's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT and DEFAULT JUDGMENT.

Defendant Wuxi Suntech Power Co., Ltd.'s motion to set aside default and vacate default judgement pursuant to CCP 473.5(a) is granted. (see word minutes for full details) (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Erik M. Anderson, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Lumeta, Inc., a California corporation.
Brian Flaherty, COO for plaintiff Lumeta, Inc., a California corporation, was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defaulted defendant Wuxi Suntech Power, Co., Ltd., a Chinese corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on August 8, 2017.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendants Suntech America, Inc. and DOES 1-10, was filed on October 4, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Lumeta, Inc., a California corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Wuxi Suntech Power, Co., Ltd., a Chinese corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,500,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $840,824.16.
Attorney Fees - $53,353.00.
Costs - $6,123.11, for a total judgment in the amount of $2,400,300.27.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
